ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Continued To Jan-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment hearing against Defendant Rick Ranses.

Dept. 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:12:41 a.m.; pausing at 10:20:00 a.m.; commencing at 10:22:43 a.m. and concluding at 10:30:48 a.m.(D505)

Charles Ramses, Esq., specially appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Vista Del Monte Housing, LP. via Zoom Video Conference.
Kari Rudd appeared for the Defendant Rick Ramses as an observer via Zoom Video Conference.
Witness for the Plaintiff Becky Sitton was placed under oath and testified via Zoom video Conference.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract -Live-In Aide Agreement/Unjust Enrichment filed August 20, 2021.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant served on March 5, 2022.
Default entered as to Defendant on April 26, 2022.
Motion to set aside Judgment filed on August 29, 2022.
Order Denying Defendant's motion to Set Aside Default filed on January 12, 2023.
Motion for Default Judgment filed on May 19, 2023.

Plaintiff's Counsel orally requests the dismissal of Defendant Does 1 to 20. The Court grants the request and Defendant Does 1 to 20 are dismissed.

Plaintiff's Counsel offers proof to the Court for damages sought.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Declaration of Becky Sitton.......ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Complaint with model Lease.....ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Live-in Aide Certification........ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Email Correspondence.......ID/EVID

The Court takes Judicial Notice of the exhibits. The exhibits are marked and taken into evidence by the Court.

The Court confirmed with the witness that the offer of proof from Counsel and the declarations made are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.

The Court finds that the Plaintiff has not made their prima facie case and that the proposed judgment is not consistent with the operative pleading.

The Court further finds that the Defendant did not have the same contractual obligation as the Tenant, with whom the Defendant is caring for. Furthermore, based on the Live-in aide agreement, Defendant did not agree to move out during any time period that the Tenant is absent for longer than 1 week, therefore there was no breach of contract or unjust enrichment.

Based on the evidence presented and statements made, the request for default judgment against Defendant Rick Ranses is DENIED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Kari Rudd; Bay Area Legal Aid; 415-982-1300; appearing for defendant Rick Ranses.
Charles T. Ramsey; 510-986-0455; specially appearing on behalf of plaintiff Vista Del Monte Housing, LP.

Hearing held. Registered process server Margie Raetz Bailey is placed under oath and testifies. Plaintiff's agent, Jwana Harfouch, is placed under oath and testifies.
Victo Francis, defendant's cousin, is placed under oath and testifies. Defendant Rick Ranses is placed under oath and testifies. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments and live witness testimony the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT RICK RANSES' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT is denied.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Continued To Oct-26-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RICK RANSES' Motion To Set Aside Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
